mainText:
Come to Bank of Entitlement, where your worth is our priority! Get ready to be treated like the royalty you are!

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY: I demanded a meeting with the Queen one day because I felt it was my right to discuss the state of the kingdom's finances. The mere commoners in my office were initially shocked by my audacity, but I reassured them that it was for the greater good.Upon meeting Her Majesty, I boldly presented a detailed financial plan that I had scribbled on the back of a napkin. The Queen was taken aback by my directness but couldn't deny the brilliance of my ideas. She immediately implemented my suggestions, much to the chagrin of her advisors.As word spread of my royal consultation, the people hailed me as a financial genius, and I was invited to lavish banquets and exclusive events. I even received my own royal decree declaring me the "Baron of Entitlement."In the end, as I basked in my newfound glory, I realized that my entitlement had not only benefited me but also the entire kingdom. And that, my dear friends, is the power of embracing one's entitlement - for the greater good, of course.
